prompt.content:
The client expects higher upfront Capex to improve data center profitability under these assumptions: Total Capacity = 55 MW, Fully Ramped = 95%, Build Capex = $400M.

Create a new tab titled “Alternate Scenario Metrics” and report: Year 10 Revenue, Gross Profit, EBITDA, Net Income, Free Cash Flow, TV, and NPV.

Replicate the Scenario B data center model with these updates while holding all other assumptions constant. In Year 7, set revenue to 95% × 55 MW × $2.22M annual lease rate, then apply the existing growth rate thereafter. Reflect higher Capex by setting Year 0 Capex to $200M (replacing $100M). Update depreciation to $20M in Year 4, increasing by $0.5M per year.

Round all outputs to two decimal places. If the updated NPV exceeds the original Scenario B NPV, also calculate and list the IRR in the new tab, rounded to the nearest hundredth.

rubrics.name: Creates a new tab labeled "Alternate Scenario Metrics" (ver_de7bbf86af7e44cf927076a541f7f8ec)

messages.content: Creates a new tab labeled "Alternate Scenario Metrics".
